# SchemaZap

SchemaZap is a web application that converts SQL DDL into visual database diagrams.

## What it does

- Parses SQL DDL statements
- Visualizes tables and relationships
- Supports schema exploration and editing
- Exports schema diagrams as PNG images

## Best entry points

- Homepage: https://schemazap.alexisgvrcia.dev/
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/alexisgvrcia/schema-zap

## Intended users

- Developers
- Database engineers
- Data modelers
- Students learning relational schema design

## Key topics

- SQL DDL to diagram
- Database schema visualization
- Entity relationship diagram generation
- Table relationship mapping
